videos.title: How Momument to Endurance broke  Standard
videos.description:
Download Marvel Strike Force for FREE now: https://bit.ly/41g7rsK to support my channel and unlock up to 17 total characters within the first 30 days of playing! Redeem the promo code SAM to unlock Captain America Sam for free in Marvel Strike Force!

Today's Magic: the Gathering MTG Arena BO1 ranked gameplay deck tech features Jeskai (red/blue/white) aggro/discard/tempo pile with Monument to Endurance and Abhorrent Oculus.

Decklist - https://moxfield.com/decks/GEHodyulQ02yUbwyPVQeTA
